notices.html: World Cup FINAL is Sunday: kickoff 3pm at MetLife Stadium. Heavy congestion is expected on Route 3, Route 120 and the NJ Turnpike near the Meadowlands starting a few hours before kickoff, so avoid that direction Sunday afternoon if you can.

Terhune's first-ever Flower Festival is this Saturday and Sunday, book timed tickets online ahead. Holland Ridge's fall Sunflower Festival (Sept 10 to Oct 12) tickets are already on sale online, $17 per person.

blurbs.terhune: This weekend: blueberries and pick-your-own flowers are the main picks. The spring freeze hit stone fruit hard statewide, so expect little to no peaches or cherries. Call 609-924-2310 for the day's crop. Store and donuts open 9 to 6, no pets.
blurbs.vonthun: This weekend: blueberries are still picking at the South Brunswick fields, open 10 to 5 daily, field admission $3pp plus your container. Call 732-329-8656 to confirm before driving over, since a festival weekend can change the setup.
blurbs.hickory: This weekend: no specific 2026 crop update found online for this small, diversified farm. Mid-July usually means early peaches and summer vegetables. Call 609-448-0629 for the day's pick. Open 9 to 6, Sundays 2 to 6.
blurbs.hollandridge: Nothing to pick this weekend. The fall Sunflower Festival runs September 10 to October 12, $17 general admission, tickets already on sale online, worth booking ahead since it tends to sell out.
blurbs.locusthall: This weekend: blackberries (started July 2), sun-ripened peaches, and sunflowers and field flowers are picking as part of their Park and Pick, self-guided with a host check-in. Check their site for this weekend's hours, book online since picking times can fill up.
blurbs.johnsonscorner: This weekend: blueberries are still picking (their season runs mid-June through July), plus blackberries, new this year. Hayrides, animals and soft-serve on site. Call 609-654-8643 to confirm, since picking dates can shift a week or more.
blurbs.battleview: This weekend: the spring freeze wiped out cherries, peaches, nectarines and apples this year, so no stone-fruit picking. Sweet corn and tomatoes are just starting though. Call 732-462-0756 first. Bakery and store stay open.
blurbs.norzhill: This weekend: no u-pick crop currently, their picking season is really fall (corn maze and pumpkins from September). A sunflower trail is planned for later this summer. Call ahead for current farm-market produce.
blurbs.alstede: This weekend: their Very Berry Festival already wrapped (it ran June 27), but blueberries and other berries should still be pick-your-own at regular rates. A 60-minute drive, so check their daily picking list or call before heading out.
blurbs.howell: This Saturday: Evening Animal Chores, starting 5pm, free. Help out as the animals settle in for the night. Closed Sunday. Check howellfarm.org/calendar to confirm the end time before you go.

events.title: Mercer County Summer Concert Series
events.place: Mercer County Park Festival Grounds, West Windsor
